submit.sidebar.title: Your identity is guaranteed by design.
submit.sidebar.g01.title: Zero IP Logging
submit.sidebar.g01.desc: Not by the application, not by nginx. Four separate technical layers prevent any IP address from being stored.
submit.sidebar.g02.title: Two-Factor Access
submit.sidebar.g02.desc: Your report is protected by a case number and a UUID4 secret PIN. Both are required to retrieve it.
submit.sidebar.g03.title: No Fingerprinting
submit.sidebar.g03.desc: No cookies, no tracking pixels, no browser fingerprinting of any kind.
submit.sidebar.g17.title: HinSchG Compliant
submit.sidebar.g17.desc: Acknowledgement within 7 days. Response within 3 months. Bidirectional communication as required by law.
submit.title: Submit a Report
submit.alert.title: Before you submit
submit.alert.body: Save your case number and PIN in a secure location after submission. They are the only way to access your report and cannot be recovered if lost.
submit.form.description.placeholder: Describe what you observed in as much detail as possible. Include dates, locations, and names if known. You may remain anonymous — do not include information that could identify you.
submit.form.files.hint: Up to 5 files, 10 MB each. Allowed types: PDF, JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, TXT, CSV, DOCX, XLSX.
success.attachments.title: Attached Files
success.title: Report Submitted
success.subtitle: Save the credentials below immediately. This page will not be shown again.
success.warning.title: Action Required
success.warning.body: Write down or save your case number and PIN now. They cannot be recovered if lost.
success.next.title: What happens next
success.next.body.html: Acknowledgement within 7 days (§17 Abs. 1 HinSchG). Full response within 3 months of acknowledgement. Use your case number and PIN at any time to check status and communicate with the reporting office.
success.confirm.label.html: I have saved my case number and secret PIN in a secure location. I understand they cannot be recovered if lost.
status.form.title: Check Report Status
status.form.subtitle: Enter your case number and secret PIN to view your report and any responses from the reporting office.
status.locked.title: Access Locked
status.locked.body: Too many failed attempts. Please wait before trying again.
status.pin.label: Secret PIN
status.pin.hint: Enter the PIN exactly as shown when you submitted your report.
status.report.title: Report Status
status.thread.title: Communication Thread
status.attachments.title: Attached Files
status.no_messages: No messages yet. The reporting office will respond within 7 days of submission.
status.reply.title: Send a Reply
status.reply.label: Your Message
status.reply.placeholder: Your message to the reporting office…
status.other.title: Need to check another report?
login.title: Reporting Office
login.subtitle: For authorised reporting office staff only.
mfa.title: Two-Factor Auth
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.demo.title: Demo Mode
mfa.code.label: Authentication Code
mfa.code.hint: Open your authenticator app and enter the current 6-digit code.
wizard.title: Initial Setup
wizard.subtitle: Create your administrator account to get started. This wizard runs once and cannot be re-accessed after completion.
wizard.onetime.title: One-Time Setup
wizard.onetime.body: After creating the admin account, this wizard will no longer be accessible.
wizard.step1.body: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Aegis, or any compatible TOTP app. Multi-factor authentication is mandatory.
wizard.username.hint: 3–64 characters. Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
wizard.password.hint: Minimum 12 characters. Use a strong, unique password.
wizard.totp_code.hint: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
admin.dashboard.title: Reports Dashboard
admin.ip_warning.title: IP Address Detected in Request Headers
admin.ip_warning.body: OpenWhistle has detected that an upstream proxy is forwarding IP address headers (X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP, or similar) to the application. This means the network layer is leaking IP data that could compromise whistleblower anonymity.
admin.ip_warning.hint: Configure your upstream proxy (Cloudflare, Traefik, nginx) to strip these headers before passing requests to OpenWhistle. See nginx/nginx.conf for example configurations.
admin.empty.title: No reports yet
admin.empty.body: Submitted reports will appear here. Share the submit link with your organisation.
admin.filter.no_results: No reports match the current filter.
admin.report.reply.label: Send Reply to Whistleblower
admin.report.reply.hint: This reply will be visible to the whistleblower when they check their report status.
admin.report.ack.body: Send acknowledgement to the whistleblower and start the 3-month feedback clock (§17 HinSchG).
admin.report.status.label: New Status
admin.report.delete.body: Permanently delete this report and all messages (DSGVO Art. 17 right to erasure). This action cannot be undone.
admin.report.delete.confirm.title: Confirm Permanent Deletion
admin.report.delete.confirm.body: This will erase the report, all messages, and all associated data. There is no undo.
session.expiry.expired_body: You will be redirected to the login page shortly.
system.receipt_message: Your report has been received. You will receive an acknowledgement within 7 days as required by §17 HinSchG.
status.progress.title: Report Progress
status.progress.received.label: Received
status.progress.received.desc: Your report has been received and is awaiting initial review by the reporting office.
status.progress.acknowledged.label: Under Review
status.progress.acknowledged.desc: The reporting office has acknowledged your report. An investigation has been initiated. You will receive a final response by the feedback deadline.
status.progress.in_progress.label: Investigation Active
status.progress.in_progress.desc: Your report is actively being investigated. The reporting office may reach out with further questions via this communication thread.
status.progress.closed.label: Closed
status.progress.closed.desc: The investigation has been completed. Please review the communication thread above for the outcome and any actions taken.
admin.report.status.confirm_close: Are you sure you want to close this report? The whistleblower will see this as the final outcome. Consider adding a closing message first.
admin.report.status.confirm_downgrade: Are you sure you want to move this report back to an earlier status?
admin.report.status.no_change: Status is already set to this value.
admin.report.assign.label: Assigned To
admin.report.delete.pending.title: Deletion Requested
admin.report.delete.pending.body: Requested by {username}. A different admin must confirm to execute the deletion.
admin.report.delete.cannot_self: You requested this deletion — a different admin must confirm it.
admin.categories.title: Category Management
admin.categories.add.slug.hint: Lowercase, underscores only. Used as internal identifier.
admin.users.title: Admin Users
admin.users.add.totp_note: The new user must configure their TOTP authenticator on first login.
admin.audit.title: Audit Log
admin.stats.title: Statistics
status.closed.title: Case Closed
status.closed.body: This report has been fully investigated and closed. Please review the communication thread below for the outcome and any actions taken.
submit.progress.label: Form progress
submit.step.mode.title: How do you want to submit?
submit.step.mode.label: Submission Mode
submit.step.mode.anonymous.label: Anonymous
submit.step.mode.anonymous.desc: No personal data collected. Your identity is completely protected. You cannot be contacted directly.
submit.step.mode.confidential.label: Confidential
submit.step.mode.confidential.desc: You may optionally provide your name and contact information. Stored encrypted and only visible to the assigned admin.
submit.step.mode.confidential.info.title: Confidential Submission
submit.step.mode.confidential.info.body: The fields below are optional. Any information you provide will be encrypted at rest and only decrypted for the admin assigned to your case.
submit.step.mode.confidential.name.label: Your Name (optional)
submit.step.mode.confidential.contact.pl: Phone, address, or other contact detail
submit.step.mode.secure_email.label: Anonymous Email for Notifications (optional)
submit.step.mode.secure_email.hint: Optional. If provided, you will receive a brief notification (no report content) when the reporting office sends a reply. Use an anonymous email service like ProtonMail for maximum privacy.
submit.step.location.title: Which location does this concern?
submit.step.location.label: Location
submit.step.location.hint: Optional. Select the branch or location relevant to your report.
submit.step.category.hint: Select the category that best describes the violation you are reporting.
submit.step.attachments.info: Attach any supporting evidence. This step is optional — you may click Next to skip.
submit.step.review.title: Review Your Submission
submit.step.review.warning.title: Last chance to review
submit.step.review.warning.body: Please check all details before submitting. Once submitted, the report cannot be modified.
submit.error.description_too_short: Description must be at least 10 characters.
submit.error.invalid_location: The selected location is not valid.
submit.error.session_incomplete: Your session is incomplete. Please start over.
status.deadlines.title: Legal Deadlines (HinSchG)
admin.locations.title: Location Management
admin.locations.add.name: Location Name
admin.locations.add.code.hint: Unique identifier. Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores.
admin.locations.col.name: Name
admin.locations.empty: No locations configured. Reports will not prompt for a location.
admin.report.confidential.name: Name
admin.report.confidential.email_note: Whistleblower will be notified on new admin replies.
